name: BACKLOG-005
title: rabbit-project command description is misleading — clarify it is a scaffolding tool
description: The rabbit-project command file gives no hint it is a scaffolding tool (init, set-path, map, consolidate). Sessions trying to find open items or get project status invoke it and get nothing useful. Fix: add a one-line description to rabbit-project.md clarifying its purpose, e.g. "Scaffold and manage user project directories — not a status command." Low priority: affects discoverability only, not functionality.
